name: TARGETPAIR_EXISTS_BY_TARGET
description: Targetpair exists by target. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (t:Target {symbol: $target})<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)
RETURN count(DISTINCT tp) AS targetpair_count, collect(DISTINCT tp.name)[0..10] AS example_targetpairs

examples: Are there any target-pair combinations that include PRLR?
Are there any target-pair combinations that include ROR2?
Are there any target-pair combinations that include NKG2D?
